stemHtml: Above 3050 m (10,000 ft) AMSL, VMC minima for VFR in all airspace classes are...

options.b: Not defined — VFR not permitted above 10,000 ft.
options.c: 8 km visibility, 1500 m horizontal and 1000 ft vertical from cloud.
options.d: 5 km visibility, 1500 m horizontal and 1000 ft vertical from cloud.
